localized title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1
plot outline: Voldemort's (Ralph Fiennes') power is growing stronger. He now has control over the Ministry of Magic and Hogwarts. Harry (Daniel Radcliffe), Ron (Rupert Grint), and Hermione (Emma Watson) decide to finish Dumbledore's (Sir Michael Gambon's) work and find the rest of the Horcruxes to defeat the Dark Lord. But little hope remains for the trio and the rest of the Wizarding World, so everything they do must go as planned.
title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1
original title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1
